6/18/2017 Megalodon Marketing Mail - Strategy for Melissa - SEND TO HER
https://mail.google.com/mail/u/0/?ui=2&ik=e67274bc0e&view=pt&msg=15b17264f646d60e&q=in%3Asent%20competitor&qs=true&search=query&siml=15b17264… 1/2
Jeremy Haynes <jeremy@megalodon.marketing>
Strategy for Melissa SEND T O HER
Jeremy Haynes <jeremy@megalodon.marketing> 	Tue, Mar 28, 2017 at 4:00 PM
To: Eric King <eric@megalodon.marketing>
Hey Melissa!
We would love to engage with you as a client with the intention of helping you grow your personality brand to generate
leads and sales through our social services package!
We do this at a $4,000 monthly price point, and include 20% of that budget towards influencer shoutouts, boosting content
and increasing your brand awareness and engagement.
Here's what we do in that package via a list of the services included:
1. Social Media Strategy Development - we consult you on an initial and ongoing basis to define the
parameters for the best approach to take action with for all the social media content that will be created and
distributed.
2. Social Media Consulting - We take a deep dive on your social accounts and the social accounts of your
competitors and we advise you on what positioning you and your brand should take to best align with
current and future leads and customers.
3. Community Management - we help you build and maintain a community or 'tribe' that is engaged via groups
or social media forums to engage leads, customers and fans long term with another organic--brand owned
distribution channel.
4. Crisis Management - if something should happen like a spike in negative feedback, a brand disaster occurs
(rare, but why not be prepared for the unexpected), or whatever else can be defined as a crisis to handle such
circumstances in real time and with tenacity.
5. Measurement & Monitoring - we deliver a weekly report for all engagement, fan growth, lead generation
and sales numbers via an analytic report that's easy to comprehend and explained by an account manager for
what happened in that 7 day window and what's projected to happen next.
6. Social Listening - we actively monitor all social channels we're taking on for fan, lead and customer posts
and communications via monitoring tools to allow us to stay on top of the social trends and hear what the
customer wants next or now.
7. Article Creation & Distribution - we staff a copy writer on your account to create articles for social channels
like LinkedIn, Medium and sometimes we take those articles and turn them into articles for Huffington Post,
Inc, Forbes, Fortune, Business.com, Influencive, Pursuit and more.
8. Social Selling Consulting & Execution - we consult you and your brand on an ongoing basis for what
direction, message and content can be created by us internally to allow you to generate leads and sales.
9. YouTube Views/Subscribers Growth - we actively take the video content provided to us by you and your
brand and post it on Youtube to ensure your contents return and engagement is maximized.
When we move forward together in our agreement after you approve the action plan below, we start right away.
I've taken a few hours of my day and put together a comprehensible list of what we would like to do for you and your
brand to help with your current goals and objectives:
1. Create you new assets - you need a brand lift. Meaning we need to create high quality content for you that we
can distribute on your social channels after you approve to help raise awareness to you, and to what you do. We
do with the intention of helping cold traffic (people we send to your social profiles who don't know you) to
increase the probability of them converting into fans, leads and customers. This is a critical step to help with
your positioning and conversions.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

6/18/2017 Megalodon Marketing Mail - Strategy for Melissa - SEND TO HER
https://mail.google.com/mail/u/0/?ui=2&ik=e67274bc0e&view=pt&msg=15b17264f646d60e&q=in%3Asent%20competitor&qs=true&search=query&siml=15b17264… 2/2
2. Approval and Posting - After you approve all of the assets that we create, we are going to schedule them out to
post on your social channels, and now we are in the action phase together. This phase is us creating content for
your personality brand and for the company that you represent with you associated in the content, to get new
attention and retain the attention generated. We have an intention with the content to push people to sign up with
you to become a distributor or to live a certain lifestyle at which point you explain the opp, etc. We put people in
contact with you by expanding your brand attention via content distribution on social media in this step.
3. Influencer marketing and PR - After we've generated content and beefed up your current social platforms, we're
going to be getting you shoutouts at 2 shoutouts per week from largely followed and highly engaged pages that
will drive followers, leads and sales into your funnel. We also have 2 articles created and posted for you on
Huffington Post and potentially Inc or another platform, with 1 being posted every other week.
4. Reporting and More Action - In this step we are going to focus on analytics and ensuring that we are expanding
the brand by posting in higher frequency, and showing you reporting on what's going on and where/how we're
hitting objectives and goals we set together
5. Assessment - At the end of our 30 day billing cycle together, we review all the data we generated and report on
the results created. We then have a strategy session and either recalibrate based on that end of month discussion,
or we continue repeating successful actions.
We're looking forward to a follow up conversation with any questions on this process, and are excited to work with
you! Let us know some good times that work for you to follow up.
Talk soon,
Jeremy Haynes
CEO/Founder
Megalodon Marketing, LLC
